completed_steps.summary: Classified repository as multi-part with backend and frontend parts
Found existing documentation in README files, DEV_GUIDE, CLA, docs, frontend component docs, backend migrations docs, deploy docs, and GitHub workflows
Detected Go/Gin/Ent backend and Vue/Vite/TypeScript frontend
Quick scan completed using manifests, route registration files, Ent schema names, directory structure, and docs inventory
Extracted development commands, setup notes, CI and deployment configuration
Mapped cross-part integration through /api/v1, embedded frontend build, AI gateway routes, payment and ops flows
Generated backend and frontend architecture documents
Generated supporting documentation for API contracts, data models, component inventory, development and deployment
Validated JSON files, generated file list, missing incomplete markers, markdown links and ignored git status

project_classification.summary: backend is a Go API gateway and SaaS backend; frontend is a Vue admin/user console built into backend/internal/web/dist for embedded releases

technology_stack.backend: Go 1.26.2, Gin 1.9.1, Ent 0.14.5, Wire 0.7.0, PostgreSQL, Redis
technology_stack.frontend: Vue 3.5.26, Vite 5.4.21, TypeScript 5.6.3, Pinia 2.3.1, Vue Router 4.6.4, TailwindCSS 3.4.19, Vitest 2.1.9

findings.quick_scan_scope: No exhaustive source audit was performed. Generated docs are based on config, manifests, route registrations, schema filenames/field declarations, directory inventory, and existing documentation.

batches_completed.summary: Extracted backend stack, entrypoints, route groups and gateway endpoints
Extracted frontend stack, route groups, API client behavior and build output
Inventoried existing docs, Dockerfile, deploy assets and GitHub workflows

validation.note: Generated docs are ignored by .gitignore pattern docs/* and therefore do not appear in normal git status.

resume_instructions: Workflow complete. Use docs/index.md as the primary entry point for brownfield PRD and AI-assisted development.
